title: XLIII.

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: In these things there was signified by prophecy that the people, having become transgressors, shall be bound by the chains of their own sins.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: But the breaking of the bonds of their own accord indicates that, upon repentance, they shall be again loosed from the shackles of sin.
